title: PMFBY Farmers Insurance Coverage Analysis
description: District-level SQL analysis of India's PMFBY crop insurance data to measure farmer coverage, premium contribution splits, and regional coverage gaps.
insights: Built 26 SQL queries covering filtering, aggregation, joins, subqueries, constraints, and DML validation.
Added derived metrics including coverage rate, insured-to-premium ratio, and average premium per farmer.
Resolved blank and buggy starter queries with case-safe filters, unit-aware calculations, and joined aggregate logic.
